overall.description: A third-person view from a video game showing a character standing in a grand gothic hall illuminated by floating candles and warm firelight. Other robed figures walk through the ornate stone interior, suggesting a wizarding school setting with a large central fountain and high vaulted ceilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic hall with floating candles and central fountain

agents.ego_description: standing still near the hall entrance, watching other students walk through the candlelit space

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking from right to left past the camera
small robed figure walking toward the central fountain

entered.detail: large ornate fountain with a golden figure riding a winged creature atop a tiered stone pedestal
dozens of lit candles suspended in mid-air beneath the high vaulted ceiling
tall gothic stone columns with carved capitals supporting the ceiling structure
group of lit candles on an ornate stand providing warm ambient lighting
intricate geometric stone tile pattern in red and gold tones with circular motifs

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady third-person view from behind a robed character standing in a vast candlelit hall. The space features a magnificent central fountain with a golden statue, floating candles illuminating the gothic architecture, and scattered students in dark robes walking through the ornate marble interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady third-person perspective within a grand gothic hall, capturing the atmospheric stillness of a magical academy. It begins from behind a robed character, looking out across a vast marble interior illuminated by the soft glow of floating candles. As the camera holds its position, the view encompasses a magnificent central fountain topped with a golden statue that anchors the ornate space. The scene then expands to reveal scattered students in dark robes drifting through the vaulted architecture, their movement adding a sense of life to the flickering, candlelit environment.
